hooks.command: cd /home/user/trupWebsite && LAST_CLAUDE=$(git log -1 --format="%at" -- CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); LAST_COMMIT=$(git log -1 --format="%at" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); DIFF=$((LAST_COMMIT - LAST_CLAUDE)); if [ "$DIFF" -gt 86400 ]; then DAYS=$((DIFF / 86400)); COMMITS=$(git log --oneline $(git log -1 --format="%H" -- CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null)..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "CLAUDE.md is $DAYS day(s) behind the latest commit ($COMMITS commit(s) not yet documented). Run /sync-context to update it."; fi
